# nomad_plugins (Data Source)

Retrieve a list of dynamic plugins in Nomad.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nomad_plugins" "example" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `type` (String) Volume Type (currently only 'csi')

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `plugins` (List of Map of String) Registered plugins
